title: Taking Giant Leap Towards Global Sustainability Reporting - FinancialEDGE
description: Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director Financial Edge, and Ken Egbas, Chief Responsibility Officer TRUCSR, participated in a two-day technical training program focused on supporting high-quality disclosures aligned with the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB). The event was a collaborative effort between prominent Nigerian regulatory bodies and professional services firms, including the Financial Reporting Council of Nigeria
html: Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director Financial Edge, and Ken Egbas, Chief Responsibility Officer TRUCSR, participated in a two-day technical training program focused on supporting high-quality disclosures aligned with the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB).
